name: Bard
summary: Versatile performer who inspires allies and dabbles in arcane magic. Spontaneous caster from the bard list.

class_features.name: Bardic Knowledge
class_features.summary: +1/2 class level on all Knowledge checks; may make Knowledge checks untrained.

class_features.name: Bardic Performance
class_features.summary: Use as a standard action; sustain as free action. Rounds per day = 4 + Cha modifier. At L1, available performances: Countersong, Distraction, Fascinate, Inspire Courage.

class_features.name: Cantrips
class_features.summary: Knows all 0-level bard spells; cast at will.
